creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port x11-wm/hs-xmonad fails to install on my 10-stable system.

10.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-PRERELEASE #8 r274230: Fri Nov  7 11:46:08 EST 2014 

The following is the error message received:

===>  Staging for hs-xmonad-0.11_9
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on executable: ghc - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on package: ghc>=7.8.3 - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on package: hs-extensible-exceptions>=0 - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on package: hs-mtl>=0 - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on package: hs-utf8-string>=0.3 - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on package: hs-X11>=1.5 - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on executable: gcc48 - found
===>   hs-xmonad-0.11_9 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
Installing library in
/usr/ports/x11-wm/hs-xmonad/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cabal/ghc-7.8.3/xmonad-0.11
Installing executable(s) in
/usr/ports/x11-wm/hs-xmonad/work/stage/usr/local/bin
setup: Error: Could not find module: XMonad with any suffix: ["dyn_hi"] in the
search path: ["dist/build"]
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/x11-wm/hs-xmonad
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11-wm/hs-xmonad
